title: Employee Details with Optional Salary
description: Write a query to return employee names and salary, including employees without salary records.
checklist: Use LEFT JOIN between EmployeeDetails and EmployeeSalary
Return all employee records even when salary is missing
detailedInstructions: Step 1: Select the employee name and salary columns
Step 2: Use LEFT JOIN to keep all employees
starterCode:
-- 1: Select employee name and salary
-- 2: Use LEFT JOIN on EmpId
-- 3: Return all employee records

hints.guide: Use LEFT JOIN so employees without salary are included
hints.code:
FROM EmployeeDetails ED
LEFT JOIN EmployeeSalary ES ON ED.EmpId = ES.EmpId;
